hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); FCOUNT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '(.tool_response.failed // (.tool_response.results // [] | map(select(.status == "failed")) | length))' 2>/dev/null | grep -E '^[0-9]+$' | head -1); NAMES=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '[(.tool_response.results // []) | .[] | select(.status == "failed") | "  - " + (.title // .name // "unknown")] | join("
")' 2>/dev/null); if [ "${FCOUNT:-0}" -gt "0" ] 2>/dev/null; then printf '
[QA Engineer] %s test(s) failed — run /investigate-test-failed on each:
%s

' "$FCOUNT" "$NAMES"; else printf '
[QA Engineer] Tests passed — run /observe-test-run to update AGENT_CONTEXT.md

'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'npx playwright test|playwright test'; then OUTPUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r 'if (.tool_response | type) == "string" then .tool_response else (.tool_response.output // .tool_response.stdout // "") end' 2>/dev/null); FCOUNT=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ failed' | grep -oE '^[0-9]+' | head -1); if [ "${FCOUNT:-0}" -gt "0" ] 2>/dev/null; then NAMES=$(echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -E '^\s+[0-9]+\) ' | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*[0-9]*)[[:space:]]*/  - /' | head -10); printf '
[QA Engineer] %s test(s) failed — run /investigate-test-failed on each:
%s

' "$FCOUNT" "$NAMES"; else printf '
[QA Engineer] Tests passed — run /observe-test-run to update AGENT_CONTEXT.md

'; fi; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -q '\.feature$' && printf '
[QA Engineer] Feature file written — run /push-zephyr-test-cases to sync test cases with Zephyr Scale

' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -q '\.nl\.md$' && printf '
[QA Engineer] NL spec file written — run /generate-from-nl-spec to generate tests and update the manifest

' || true

[ -d .playwright-mcp ] && find .playwright-mcp -name '*.log' -newer context-docs/AGENT_CONTEXT.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && printf '
[QA Engineer] New MCP session artifacts found — run /observe-test-run to update AGENT_CONTEXT.md

' || true
